name: NSW Whole-of-Government ICT Scheme
description: Rules for procurements covered by the NSW Whole-of-Government ICT Scheme. Mandatory use of ICT Scheme arrangements where they exist.
source: NSW Procurement Board Direction PBD-2019-05; Digital.NSW ICT Procurement

pre_checks.title: Check NSW ICT Scheme arrangements first
pre_checks.body: Before proceeding to an open market process, check whether a whole-of-government ICT arrangement covers this requirement. Use of ICT Scheme arrangements is mandatory where an applicable arrangement exists. Search the ICT Scheme catalogue at buy.nsw.gov.au.

pre_checks.title: Confirm software licensing entitlements
pre_checks.body: For software renewals, confirm current licensing entitlements and check whether whole-of-government licensing arrangements (e.g., Microsoft, Adobe, Google Workspace) apply before seeking new quotes.

obligations.title: ICT Scheme mandatory use
obligations.body: Where a NSW Government ICT Scheme arrangement exists for this category of ICT product or service, use of that arrangement is mandatory. Proceeding to open market when an applicable arrangement exists requires a documented exemption approved by the appropriate delegate.
obligations.policy: PBD-2019-05 s3.1; NSW Procurement Policy Framework

obligations.title: Cyber security requirements apply to ICT procurement
obligations.body: All ICT procurements must address the NSW Cyber Security Policy requirements. The supplier must demonstrate compliance with applicable security standards. Include cyber security requirements in your specification and evaluation criteria.

obligations.title: Data sovereignty and hosting requirements
obligations.body: For cloud and SaaS procurements, confirm data hosting location aligns with NSW Government data sovereignty requirements. Data classified as PROTECTED or above must be hosted in Australia by an Australian-accredited provider.
obligations.policy: NSW Government Cloud Policy; Protective Security Policy Framework

pathway_overrides.if_arrangement_exists: Use ICT Scheme arrangement — this pre-empts the standard pathway selection
pathway_overrides.if_no_arrangement: Proceed with recommended pathway as normal

steps: Search NSW ICT Scheme catalogue at buy.nsw.gov.au for applicable arrangements
If arrangement found: use scheme process (obtain quotes from scheme panel, not open market)
If no arrangement found: proceed with recommended pathway below
